disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden, severe swelling and pain of the right ankle over 48 hours, hot to touch, with a bad limp and inability to weight-bear normally
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My right ankle blew up over the last two days — it's swollen, hot and so painful I can barely stand on it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A significant episode of gastroenteritis (severe diarrhoeal illness) about three weeks before this presentation, now resolved
trigger_question_examples: Have you been unwell in any other way recently?
Any tummy upsets or infections in the last few weeks?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, a few weeks back I had a really bad bout of gastro — awful diarrhoea for days — but that cleared up on its own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Burning pain on passing urine (dysuria) developing over the same couple of days
trigger_question_examples: You mentioned burning when you pee — tell me more.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It burns like fire when I wee, it started around the same time as the ankle.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Both eyes red, gritty and irritated without thick purulent discharge, over the same period
trigger_question_examples: Any discharge or is it more redness and grittiness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both eyes are really red and gritty, like sand in them, but there's no thick gunk or pus.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feeling feverish, fatigued and generally unwell for the last two days, without a measured temperature
trigger_question_examples: How have you felt in yourself?
Any fevers, chills or feeling wiped out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've felt really washed out and a bit feverish, just not right in myself.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: On direct questioning: no shaking chills or rigors, and the joint has not become fiery-red, tense or dramatically worse over hours
trigger_question_examples: Have you had shaking chills or teeth-chattering shivers?
Is the joint getting rapidly worse, tense and fiery red?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No proper shaking chills, and the ankle's bad but it hasn't suddenly gone fiery red or rock hard.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't really know what counts as a rigor.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: On direct questioning: eyes are red and gritty but there is no eye pain, no light sensitivity and no change or loss of vision
trigger_question_examples: Is there any pain deep in the eye or sensitivity to light?
Have you noticed any blurring or change in your vision?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's more gritty and red than painful — my vision is fine and light doesn't especially bother me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Over-the-counter ibuprofen gives minimal relief; no antibiotics taken recently
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Just chemist ibuprofen and it barely helps; I haven't had any antibiotics.
